hypothesis: If an EGNN-based diffusion model with energy-guided denoising and HMC refinement is trained on amorphous materials datasets, then it will generate density-controlled amorphous structures that reproduce reference RDFs, bond-angle distributions, structure factors, and energy distributions and can be conditioned to achieve target Young’s modulus, because equivariant, energy-guided diffusion captures interatomic symmetries and energetics while enabling property control.
